prestazioni: Engine swap to a **ZMZ-505.10 V8** (5.5L, 90° OHV, 240 HP stock) with a **Garrett GT4202 turbocharger** (86mm compressor, .96 A/R turbine housing) and **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate**, paired with a **Holley Sniper EFI** standalone ECU and **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** for E85 compatibility. Forced induction via **custom 3.5" intercooler piping** with **Vibrant Performance silicone couplers** and a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (600x300x76mm core).

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **GAZ-24-10 5-speed manual transmission** (strengthened synchros) mated to a **Centerforce DFX clutch** (multi-disc, 11" organic/carbon hybrid) and **PPG close-ratio gears** (2.64:1 1st, 1.58:1 2nd). Rear differential upgraded to a **GAZ-31029 limited-slip diff** (25% lock) with **Motul Gear 300 75W-90** fluid and **custom 3.9:1 final drive** for optimized acceleration.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Variant 3 coilovers** (24-way adjustable damping, 50mm front/45mm rear spring rates) and **polyurethane bushings** (front control arms, sway bar links) from **SuperPro**. Braking system features **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (330mm rotors front, 300mm rear) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines**. Chassis stiffening via **custom subframe connectors** (1.5" DOM tubing) and **GAZ-24-34 strut tower braces** (reinforced steel).
estetica: Bodywork modified with **custom hand-formed aluminum fender flares** (2" wider front, 3" wider rear) to accommodate **Nitto NT05 245/40R17 front and 275/40R17 rear tires** on **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9" wheels** (+15mm offset). Front bumper replaced with a **GAZ-31029 rally-inspired unit** (carbon fiber splitter, tow hooks) and rear bumper fitted with a **custom 3D-printed diffuser** (ABS plastic, 3" exit tunnel).

Aerodynamic package includes a **custom aluminum hood** (louvered, 20% weight reduction) with **NACA ducts** feeding the intercooler, and a **Rocket Bunny-style ducktail spoiler** (hand-laid fiberglass, adjustable angle). Side skirts are **GAZ-24-10 widebody conversion pieces** (reinforced with carbon fiber weave) and the roof is wrapped in **3M Matte Military Green (213)** with **clear bra protection** on the leading edges.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro SRD-E seats** (fixed-back, 5-point harnesses) and **Sparco 6-point bolt-in roll cage** (TIG-welded, 1.75" DOM tubing). Dashboard replaced with a **custom aluminum panel** (CNC-machined, anodized black) housing **AEM X-Series gauges** (boost, AFR, oil pressure) and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede). Sound deadening removed and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** on floor pans only for weight savings.
